commands.review_summary:
The PR changes QMD memory backend command resolution so Windows drive-letter and UNC command paths keep their backslashes before process-spawn resolution, with regression tests for those command shapes.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +50. Total +77 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and v2026.6.8 still pass memory.qmd.command through splitShellArgs, whose unquoted backslash handling strips Windows separators before QMD spawn resolution.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is indicated; the remaining blockers are contributor Windows QMD runtime proof and maintainer selection among overlapping fix PRs.
